title: Keyboard navigation hook for tab management
purpose: Provides keyboard shortcuts for tab navigation, closing, and switching between tabs in a session-based interface.
module_context: Exports a React hook useTabKeyboard that manages global keyboard event listeners for tab operations and integrates with tab and session stores.

steps.content: Get the target element from the keyboard event.
IF the target is null, return false.
IF the target is an input or textarea element, return true.
IF the target is content editable, return true.
ELSE return false.
Setup a keyboard event listener when the hook is mounted.
IF the hook is disabled, do nothing.
On each keydown event, check if control or meta key is pressed.
IF control or meta key is not pressed, do nothing.
IF the target is an editing element and the key is not tab, do nothing.
Get the current session from the session store.
IF there is no valid session, do nothing.
Generate a session key from project and session name.
Get the tab entry for this session from the tabs store.
IF there is no tab entry, do nothing.
Sort the tabs by their order property.
IF there are no tabs, do nothing.
Find the index of the currently active tab.
IF the key is tab, prevent default behavior and navigate to next or previous tab.
IF the key is w or W, prevent default behavior and close the active tab.
IF the key is a number from 1-9, prevent default behavior and switch to the corresponding tab.
Cleanup the event listener when the component unmounts.
